info.title: Emburse Virtual Cards API
info.description: Emburse API for managing virtual and physical credit cards, transactions, allowances, members, accounting, and shared links.

get.description: Retrieve cards with optional filtering by assignment, category, department, location, label, and state.

post.description: Create a new card. New virtual cards are pre-activated.

put.description: Update accounting-related fields on a transaction.

get.description: Export account statement in CSV, OFX, or PDF format.

bearerAuth.description: OAuth2 Bearer token. Pass as: Authorization: Token ACCESS_TOKEN
